account.cloudSaveDelayedMsg: We could not reach the cloud. Sign out anyway?
account.deleteAccountMsg: This will permanently delete your cloud account and all synced data. Local data will remain on this device. Continue?
account.dissociateAccountMsg: Your cloud account will be deleted, but all your local data stays on this device. You'll continue as a guest.
account.deleteEverythingMsg: This will permanently delete your cloud account AND wipe all local data. This cannot be undone.
account.accountDeletedGuest: Account removed. Your data is still here — you are now a guest.
account.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
account.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
account.verificationSentMsg: Please check both your old and new email addresses for confirmation links.
account.setupRpc: Make sure the delete_user RPC is setup in Supabase.
